name: godot-superpowers
description: Single-plugin marketplace for godot-superpowers — full-spectrum Godot 4.x game development plugin for Claude Code.

plugins.name: godot-superpowers
plugins.description: 33 skills, 15 subagents, hooks (gdformat / gdlint / .tscn validation / dependency integrity / file-verifier dispatch reminder), MCP integration. Covers scaffolding, components, state machines, save systems with schema migration, UI patterns, networking foundation, GUT tests, shaders, audio, export pipelines with CI, genre packs, a subagent dev mode (orchestrator + file-verifier + milestone-integrator) for token-efficient milestone execution, scene-repair via merge-specialist, and a feature-mode trail (codebase-survey + feature-spec + feature-plan) for changes on top of existing games.
